name: Email Archive
summary: Full-text search over an exported (mbox) email history -- find any old email in milliseconds.
description: Indexes a Gmail Takeout .mbox export into a node-local SQLite FTS index and adds an instant, searchable lens (search box + results with highlighted snippets + a message reader). Read-only; the archive never leaves this machine. Backed by the core helper command-center/email_archive.py + the /api/email-* routes; the lens only appears where the extension is installed.

help.sub: Instantly search your old exported email -- a sender, a subject, or anything in the body.
help.h:
What: a fast search over a big email export (a Gmail Takeout .mbox). It builds a one-time local index, so every search returns in milliseconds with highlighted snippets, and you can open any message to read it in full.

Why: years of old email (e.g. from a previous job) stay findable -- pull up that one thread from two years ago without ever loading it back into Gmail.

How: point it at the .mbox file (config email_archive_mbox), build the index once (the index-build routine, or python3 command-center/email_archive.py index <mbox> <db>), then just type in the search box. Read-only -- the archive never leaves this machine.

email_archive_mbox.label: Path to the .mbox export (Gmail Takeout Mail)

email_archive_db.label: Path for the search index (SQLite); defaults under the node state dir

draggables.label: Archived email
draggables.note: Drag any search result onto a Claude session (or into the Basket) to hand the agent the full email -- headers + body -- as context. Resolved server-side from the local index by id.

agent_cli: cc-email search "<query>" [limit] | cc-email get <id> | cc-email stats
